---
name: Request for Spec (RFS) Proposal
about: Propose a design change or new top-level construct in OmniLang
title: 'rfs: '
labels: rfs, design
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-paragraph summary of the proposed specification change.

## Motivation
Why are we introducing this language feature? What developer scenarios does it address?

## Detailed Design
Provide a detailed breakdown of:
1. Syntax additions (keywords, operators, formatting)
2. AST representation (proposed Rust structures)
3. AST validation (rules, constraints, analyzer checks)
4. Target code generation changes (e.g. how it affects TS/Rust/Python runtime generation)

### Syntax Draft
```omnilang
// Code examples demonstrating the design
```

## Drawbacks
What are the costs or complexities of adding this to the language?

## Alternatives
Are there simpler ways to achieve the same result?
